name: Shimla Manali Agra Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Shimla, Manali, Agra with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: New Delhi to Shimla (360Kms 7/8 Hours Approx
itinerary.description: New Delhi to Shimla (360Kms 7/8 Hours Approx.); Upon arrival Morning at the Airport/ Railways station and drive towards Shimla. Shimla, a very popular holiday-retreat, is well-known for its Victorian architecture, which is reflected in certain areas of the Mall and The Ridge.  Upon arrival at Shimla, Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Shimla; After breakfast at the hotel, proceed for a half day excursion to Kufri
itinerary.description: Shimla; After breakfast at the hotel, proceed for a half day excursion to Kufri (2500mts). Kufri is also renowned for other adventure activities such as skiing, tobogganing (sliding downhill on a sled), etc. Kufri has the oldest skiing slopes in Himachal Pradesh.  You can also take a hike or a Pony up to Mashu Peak. Afternoon: Guests will be dropped at the Shimla elivetore & explore by themselves. Attractions of the mall road include Shimla Church, Scandal Point, Gaiety Theater, Town hall, Jaku

itinerary.title: Shimla to Manali (272Kms 7/8 Hours Approx
itinerary.description: Shimla to Manali (272Kms 7/8 Hours Approx.) ; After breakfast at the hotel, depart for Manali. Drive past Beas-Sutlej Link project, Pandoh Dam & En-Rout halt Kullu Valley (Boat ride direct payment basi) -  Lunch shall be en-route on direct payment basis. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Manali : After Breakfast, Proceed for local sightseeing of Manali ( Day Trip )
itinerary.description:
Manali : After Breakfast, Proceed for local sightseeing of Manali ( Day Trip ). Visit Solang Valley, You can opt for adventure sports like Paragliding, Zorbing, and Skiing (subject to snow & weather conditions) on a direct payment basis.  Overnight at the hotel.
(Optional tour costing Extra Atul Tunel, Sissu & Rohtang)

itinerary.title: Manali : Sightseeing; After Breakfast, Proceed for local sightseeing of Manali
itinerary.description: Manali : Sightseeing; After Breakfast, Proceed for local sightseeing of Manali. Visit Vashishtha Kund & Hadimba Temple, Tibetan Monastery & Mall Road, Van vihar. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Manali to Delhi (550 Kms
itinerary.description: Manali to Delhi (550 Kms./ 12-13 Hours Approx.) : After breakfast Proceed to Delhi & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Agra (250 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi to Agra (250 Kms./ 3-4 Hours Approx.) ; After breakfast Proceed to Agra a guided tour to visit Taj Mahal & Agra fort. Overnight stay at the hotel

itinerary.title: Agra to Delhi (250 Kms
itinerary.description:
Agra to Delhi (250 Kms./3-4 Hours Approx.): After breakfast proceed to Delhi and a guided tour to visit India gate, President house, Lotus temple, Qutub minar & drop you at airport/railway station with sweet memories.
Please note: Taj Mahal Close on Every Friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Inclusions
Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Breakfast & Dinner
All Transfers, All sightseeing as per Tour Itinerary
All long distance Travels
Toll Taxes, Parkings, Fuel
State Taxes,

seo.title: Shimla Manali Agra Tour | Mother India Tour Travels
seo.description: Book Shimla Manali Agra Tour with Mother India Tour Travels. Best deals on Delhi, Shimla, Manali, Agra tour packages. Includes hotels, transport & guide.
